message:
chore(mermaid): upgrade sequence diagram feature matrix to Partial (bd-2kn9a)

Update FEATURE_MATRIX entries for sequence diagram features:
- activation bars: Unsupported → Partial (parse + IR + render)
- notes: Unsupported → Partial (parse + IR)
- alt/opt/loop/par blocks: Unsupported → Partial (parse + IR + layout + render)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1607,28 +1607,28 @@ pub const FEATURE_MATRIX: &[FeatureMatrixEntry] = &[

+        note: "parse + IR + layout + render",
